text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By now, Eishin Flash has a number of victories
under her belt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's getting an award for setting a new record.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for what it's for...

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has won an astounding number of G1
races here at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your achievement!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
Once again, allow me to remind everyone that
these are G1 races that she has won! This is a
truly historical record she has made!

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
It's no stretch calling her the Ace of Tokyo! Here
is the champion of Tokyo, Eishin Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would not refer to myself as such, but thank you
for your kind words.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's hear from the coolheaded champion
herself! Could you please tell us your thoughts on
your incredible accomplishment?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, I would like to thank everyone for preparing
this wonderful venue.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, it was here at the Tokyo
Racecourse that I saw my first race in Japan three
years ago.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to see for myself what races in Japan
were like and get a better sense of them...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I was immediately captivated by the racers'
immense skill. That was when I swore to myself
that I would race alongside them one day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash pauses and glances in my direction.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And with support from many people, I was able to
achieve that. No, I did not simply achieve my
dreams—I exceeded them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to use this platform to express my
gratitude for everyone who has helped me
become this strong.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Eishin Flash! In honor of your grand
achievement, we have prepared something for
you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text: Please behold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The staff member pulls back the curtain to reveal
a memorial plaque dedicated to Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text:
This is your very own monument! The picture in
the center displays the moment you crossed the
finish line during your senior year and won the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm so overwhelmed... I cannot think of what to
say, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This is truly an honor. Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome, and congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the event ends, Eishin Flash approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I would like to ask you a favor.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind taking a picture next to this
monument? I'd like to show my parents.
choice_data_list: Sure! I can take it on my phone for you.
Sure! I can take it on my phone for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah, pardon. Allow me to clarify...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would like to take a picture together with you, if
that is fine?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let's stand either side of the monument for it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm? Trainer, you're out of the frame...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I should have asked Falcon for instructions on
how to take selfies properly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. I finally got a good picture of the two of
us.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will be sure to master selfie-taking in
preparation for next time...
choice_data_list: What do you mean by "next time"?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A great many races remain on our schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I shall leave behind even greater records in those
and surely have another monument built for me at
some point.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As long as we work together, we can make it all a
reality!
